programs.name: Elite/Travel

programs.name: Regional
programs.description: Competitive teams playing within the SRVA region.

programs.name: Developmental/Training
programs.description: Focus on skill building for younger or newer players.

usa_volleyball.expert_note: 2025-2027 Rule Highlights: Jewelry allowed if small/snug; re-serve allowed for tossing error (once per turn); Libero can be team captain; Coaches can stand/walk in free zone to attack line extension.

srva.expert_note: SRVA Policies: All participants must have valid USAV membership before tryouts. Offers accepted in SportsEngine are binding for the season. Max tryout fee $75.

faq.question: Where do I sign in for tryouts?
faq.answer: Check-in is at the front desk of Hooptown (6910 Stroop Ln, Smyrna). Please arrive 30 minutes early.

faq.question: What do I need to be ready for?
faq.answer: Bring water, knee pads, and court shoes. Ensure SRVA membership and medical forms are complete.

social_updates.instagram: Latest from @midtnvbc: 'Our 2026-27 season prep is in full swing at Hooptown! #MidTNVBC'
